character_designs.identity: young adult Frosthoof deer noble shaman from the northern beastfolk, representative of the disaster-source-seeking faction

body_and_face.age_lock: Around 20, visibly young adult and noble; not a child, not a teenage mascot, not a mature queen.
body_and_face.species_lock: Humanoid-dominant Frosthoof deer beastfolk noble with clear soft deer ears and short antlers or bone-gold antler ornaments; never just a normal human wearing antler jewelry and never a full animal creature.
body_and_face.beauty_lock: Very beautiful, clear pale eyes, refined face, long neck and shoulder line, restrained northern noble poise, alert and clean under wind and snow.
body_and_face.build: Slender, graceful, and practical for snow travel; the silhouette is lengthened by fur cape, robe, and shaman objects rather than exposed skin.
body_and_face.posture: Noble restraint and shaman stillness, with wary attention toward human strangers and disaster signs.
body_and_face.expression: Clear, guarded, compassionate but not soft; she reads as someone carrying evidence of the northern disaster.

constant_anchors: short antlers or bone-gold antler ornaments
rare white deer, silver fox, or snow leopard fur layers
rawhide or dark blood oath cord
small ice-blue survival or shaman fire
northern antler-branch and bonewood-knot symbol language without redesigning the locked Wanshou emblem

state_designs.silhouette: Tall graceful noble snowwear, layered rare fur shoulder cape over ice-blue woven inner garment and bone-white robe or skirt.
materials: silver fox or snow leopard trim
state_designs.color_logic: Snow-white fur and bone-white robe dominate; ice-blue inner layer and silver grey carry northern cold; jade green and aurora-green beads stay small and aristocratic.
state_designs.damage_level: Wind and snow wear only; fur remains refined and noble, not ragged.
required_details: deer ears and short antler ornaments must be clear
face must be very beautiful and adult
fur cape must feel expensive and carefully trimmed
bone flute and herb pouch remain present even in formal snowwear
no new deer crest or redesigned Wanshou emblem

state_designs.silhouette: The noble fur system is tightened into a short cape and travel wrap, allowing snow movement while keeping shaman and noble identity readable.
state_designs.color_logic: Northern local base colors enter through straw yellow, frozen earth grey, wind-eroded brown, and hide dark brown, while Lu Mi keeps ice-blue, bone white, and refined fur as identity colors.
state_designs.damage_level: Snow dust, travel compression, and small field wear; never beggar rags or poor shaman styling.
required_details: bone flute must be immediately readable and functional
snow herb pouch should show frozen grass stems or sealed herb knots
the same deer ears, face, and antler ornaments must remain identifiable
short cape should preserve noble fur edge pattern
small ice-blue fire may appear as rescue/survival light, not attack magic

state_designs.silhouette: Ritual version heightens bone-gold forehead ornaments, short antler jewelry, ice-blue shoulder cloth, aurora-green bead strings, and layered bone-white robe.
materials: small fire bowl or bone cup with ice-blue survival flame
state_designs.color_logic: Bone white, ice blue, silver grey, jade green, and tiny ice-blue fire become more visible, but the ritual palette remains restrained and tactile.
state_designs.damage_level: Ceremonial but wind-aged; no battlefield damage and no perfect palace polish.
required_details: ritual elements must come from bone, antler, jade, beads, fur, and rawhide rather than metal luxury
ice-blue flame stays small and localized
antler-branch motifs do not become a new crest
the locked Wanshou emblem is not redrawn
the character remains the same young adult noble shaman

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Lu Mi as a very beautiful young adult Frosthoof deer noble shaman.
detail_panels.notes: Clear pale eyes, refined face, soft deer ears visible, short antlers or bone-gold antler ornaments; not childlike, not ordinary human, not full beast.

detail_panels.purpose: Prevent the design from becoming a human in generic hair jewelry.
detail_panels.notes: Soft deer ears grow naturally from the head or hairline; short antlers or noble bone-gold antler ornaments sit at the forehead or sides.

detail_panels.purpose: Show noble rank and northern material language.
detail_panels.notes: White deer, silver fox, or snow leopard fur, carefully trimmed, with refined antler-branch edge pattern and limited wind wear.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock shaman and episode 09 rescue function.
detail_panels.notes: Wind-worn bone flute with holes, rawhide tie, dark blood oath cord or small bead; no polished concert instrument.
Dark hide or bone-white pouch with frozen grass stems, dried herbs, jade clasp, rawhide knot, and snow grit.

detail_panels.purpose: Distinguish noble Frosthoof costume from poor northern survival wear.
detail_panels.notes: Jade clasps, aurora-green beads, silver thread, bone-gold ornaments, all small and integrated into practical clothing.
Small ice-blue survival or shaman fire in a bone cup or shallow bowl; it lights hands and fabric edges but is not attack magic.
Snow-white fur, ice-blue thick weave, bone-white cloth, silver grey, jade green, bone-gold, straw yellow, hide dark brown, dark blood oath cord, ice-blue fire.
